title: senna obtusifolia
intro: Senna obtusifolia, also known as Chinese senna, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna obtusifolia include treating digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome, bloating, and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. Senna obtusifolia is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements to support digestive health.
